name: MoveIt 2
description: MoveIt 2 is the most widely used open-source software framework for robotic manipulation. It provides motion planning (sampling-based and optimisation-based), collision checking, kinematics solvers (analytical and numerical), grasp planning, pick-and-place pipelines, and integration with physical robot controllers. MoveIt 2 works with ROS 2 and supports a wide range of robot arms through URDF/SRDF robot descriptions. It includes a visual planning interface (RViz plugin) for interactive testing.
whyUseIt: MoveIt 2 saves months of development time by providing a complete, tested motion planning and execution framework. Instead of implementing your own collision checking, IK solvers, and trajectory optimisers, you configure MoveIt for your robot and immediately get access to state-of-the-art planning algorithms (OMPL, STOMP, TrajOpt). It is used by most ROS-based manipulation projects worldwide, from research labs to commercial products, and understanding MoveIt is essential for any robotic manipulation engineer.
